message:
test: add cross-provider parity test for subagent spawn and wait (GAP-9.12C)

Verifies the spawn_agent + wait lifecycle works identically across
all three providers: spawn returns an agent_id, wait blocks until
completion, and the SubAgentResult contains the expected output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
